3314940.name: Fantasy Grounds - Read Magic - The Compilation
3314940.description:
Read Magic - The Compilation

Read Magic - The Compilation brings together spells from multiple adjacent rule systems for use in the
Pathfinder Roleplaying Game . In this book you will get:
  • Spell lists for all of the 1st-party spellcasting classes including the adept.
  • Spell lists for some 3rd-party classes, like the death mage and the lathspell.
  • 250 new spells, inspired by spells from multiple editions of the well known table-top roleplaying game system,
    Pathfinder 1st and
    2nd editions , and
    Starfinder .
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Connor Bates
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and the included Pathfinder RPG and D&D 3.5/ OGL ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
